title: Transatlantic Merry-Go-Round
writer: Leon Gordon, Joseph Moncure March, Harry W. Conn
actors: Jack Benny, Gene Raymond, Nancy Carroll
plot: Underworld king Lee Lother has been killed aboard a ocean liner, several people could have been the murderer. There is his mistress Anya Roysen, a married woman, who was jealous of his flirtations with his old moll, night club sin...
